hooks.command: if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = "true" ]; then echo 'CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE is true, Claude Code Web mode enabled'; which ffmpeg > /dev/null 2>&1 || (apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ffmpeg > /dev/null 2>&1); if [ -n "$VENTURE_IMPACT_PLATFORM_SLACK_XOXC" ]; then if ! command -v slackcli &> /dev/null; then rm -rf /tmp/slackcli && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/aking13/slackcli /tmp/slackcli && cd /tmp/slackcli && bun install && bun run build:linux && cp dist/slackcli-linux /usr/local/bin/slackcli && cd - && rm -rf /tmp/slackcli; fi && DECODED_XOXD=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.unquote('$VENTURE_IMPACT_PLATFORM_SLACK_XOXD'))") && slackcli auth login-browser --xoxc="$VENTURE_IMPACT_PLATFORM_SLACK_XOXC" --xoxd="$DECODED_XOXD" --workspace-url="$VENTURE_IMPACT_PLATFORM_SLACK_WORKSPACE_URL" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi
python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(2) if 'slackcli' in cmd and 'messages' in cmd and 'send' in cmd else sys.exit(0)"
